body:
### Added Features

- emit golang.org/x/net vulns from govlundb [PR [#3534](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3534) @willmurphyscode]
- Merge Go vuln matches with GHSA matches [Issue [#3515](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3515)]

### Bug Fixes

- only emit records for stdlib [PR [#3527](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3527) @willmurphyscode]
- mark hummingbird distro as rolling [PR [#3521](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3521) @willmurphyscode]
- disable go stdlib CPE matching by default [PR [#3517](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3517) @willmurphyscode]
- merge in custom ranges when applicable [PR [#3514](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3514) @willmurphyscode]
- exclude linux-kbuild deb indirect matches by default [PR [#3506](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3506) @westonsteimel]
- avoid panic on invalid RHEL version IDs [PR [#3490](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3490) @jspilman]
- Support reading CycloneDX 1.7 SBOMs [Issue [#3373](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3373)]
- Grype cannot read mariadb version correctly [Issue [#3452](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3452)]
- grype hangs when downloading certain images using registry client [Issue [#3492](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3492)]
- Can we get a fix for these Critical findings reported for grype [Issue [#3484](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3484)]

### Additional Changes

- Security: bump golang.org/x/crypto to v0.52.0 to resolve multiple CVEs [Issue [#3493](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3493)]
- Security: bump golang.org/x/net to v0.55.0 to resolve CVEs [Issue [#3494](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3494)]

### Dependencies

35 dependency changes (31 updated, 3 added, 1 removed). 5 vulnerabilities remediated.

**🟢 Remediated (5)**

- [GHSA-33vj-92qq-66hc](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33vj-92qq-66hc) (High) — github.com/containerd/containerd/v2
- [GHSA-cvxm-645q-p574](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvxm-645q-p574) (Medium) — github.com/containerd/containerd/v2
- [GHSA-jpcc-p29g-p8mq](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jpcc-p29g-p8mq) (Medium) — github.com/containerd/containerd/v2
- [GHSA-rgh6-rfwx-v388](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rgh6-rfwx-v388) (High) — github.com/containerd/containerd/v2
- [GHSA-xhf5-7wjv-pqxp](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xhf5-7wjv-pqxp) (High) — github.com/containerd/containerd/v2

<details>
<summary>Updated (31 packages)</summary>

- github.com/ProtonMail/go-crypto `v1.4.0` → `v1.4.1`
- github.com/anchore/bubbly `v0.2.0` → `v0.2.1`
- github.com/anchore/clio `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`
- github.com/anchore/fangs `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`

- github.com/anchore/go-homedir `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`
- github.com/anchore/go-logger `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`
- github.com/anchore/go-lzo `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`
- github.com/anchore/go-macholibre `v0.1.0` → `v0.1.1`
- github.com/anchore/go-make `v0.5.0` → `v0.8.0`

- github.com/anchore/stereoscope `v0.2.1` → `v0.2.2`

- github.com/charmbracelet/colorprofile `v0.4.1` → `v0.4.3`

- github.com/clipperhouse/uax29/v2 `v2.6.0` → `v2.7.0`
- github.com/containerd/containerd/v2 `v2.3.1` → `v2.3.2` **(🟢 remediated [GHSA-33vj-92qq-66hc](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33vj-92qq-66hc), [GHSA-cvxm-645q-p574](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvxm-645q-p574), [GHSA-jpcc-p29g-p8mq](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jpcc-p29g-p8mq), [GHSA-rgh6-rfwx-v388](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rgh6-rfwx-v388), [GHSA-xhf5-7wjv-pqxp](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xhf5-7wjv-pqxp))**
- github.com/docker/cli `v29.4.3+incompatible` → `v29.5.3+incompatible`

- github.com/spdx/tools-golang `v0.5.7` → `v0.6.0-rc4`
- github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 `v2.24.0` → `v2.24.1`
- golang.org/x/crypto `v0.52.0` → `v0.53.0`
- golang.org/x/mod `v0.36.0` → `v0.37.0`
- golang.org/x/net `v0.55.0` → `v0.56.0`
- golang.org/x/sync `v0.20.0` → `v0.21.0`
- golang.org/x/sys `v0.45.0` → `v0.46.0`
- golang.org/x/term `v0.43.0` → `v0.44.0`
- golang.org/x/text `v0.37.0` → `v0.38.0`
- golang.org/x/tools `v0.45.0` → `v0.46.0`
</details>

<details>
<summary>Added (3 packages)</summary>

- github.com/piprate/json-gold `v0.7.0`
- github.com/pquerna/cachecontrol `v0.0.0-1555304`
- github.com/tailscale/hujson `v0.0.0-ecc657c`
</details>

<details>
<summary>Removed (1 package)</summary>

- github.com/google/osv-scanner `v1.9.2`
</details>

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.114.0...v0.115.0)**

### Added Features

- Add ability to scan zarf packages [[#3329](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3329) [#3366](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3366) @brandtkeller]

### Additional Changes

- respect withdrawn status of Go Vuln DB OSV records [[#3495](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3495) @willmurphyscode]
- Govulndb OSV transformer [[#3485](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3485) @willmurphyscode]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.113.0...v0.114.0)**

### Added Features

- Include Ubuntu 26.04 "resolute" in distro codenames [[#3397](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3397) @anchore-oss-update-bot]
- source RPM filtering on Hummingbird [[#3410](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3410) @willmurphyscode]

### Bug Fixes

- use relatedVulnerabilities description as fallback in SARIF output [[#3271](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3271) @axidex]
- improve platform CPE determination logic [[#3470](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3470) @westonsteimel]
- normalize uppercase V in semantic version comparison [[#3461](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3461) @immanuwell]
- purl handling in cgr maven libs [[#3420](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3420) @willmurphyscode]
- Treat uppercase V prefixes the same as lowercase v prefixes in fuzzy version comparison [[#3037](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3037) [#3089](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3089) @wasup-yash]
- Add Runtime Warnings When TLS Verification Is Disabled or HTTP Is Enabled [[#3101](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3101) [#3396](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3396) @Dashtid]
- Add support for the aarch64 architecture when parsing the version of Ruby gems in lockfiles [[#3442](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3442) [#3475](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3475) @msnandhis]
- zsh completion fails [[#2933](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2933) [#3433](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3433) @brandtkeller]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.112.0...v0.113.0)**

### Added Features

- Expand ignore rules to owned sub packages of distro packages [[#3368](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3368) [#3326](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3326) @kzantow]

### Additional Changes

- update anchore dependencies [[#3391](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3391) @anchore-oss-update-bot]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.111.1...v0.112.0)**

### Bug Fixes

- apply overlap by ownership removal to dynamically created relationships [[#3363](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3363) @kzantow]
- compare mismatched package / db versions [[#3372](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3372) @kzantow]
- Grype doesn't recognize debian component when `"group" : "debian"` is specified [[#2967](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2967)]
- HelpURI missing information in SARIF output [[#2874](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2874) [#3351](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3351) @will-bates11]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.111.0...v0.111.1)**

### Added Features

- db diff for v6 [[#3277](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3277) @kzantow]
- add ProvideFromReader for in-memory SBOM processing [[#3344](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3344) @jspilman]
- match on hummingbird [[#3331](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3331) @willmurphyscode]
- CSAF vex transformer [[#3349](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3349) @willmurphyscode]
- curated mapping of known CPE to grype package specifiers [[#3332](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3332) @westonsteimel]
- templates/html.tmpl - Add Grype version and vulnerability DB version [[#2877](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2877) [#3345](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3345) @kenvez]

### Bug Fixes

- normalise version constraint types in v6 db [[#3328](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3328) @westonsteimel]
- set alpm ecosystem for Arch Linux packages [[#3324](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3324) @westonsteimel]
- spec-compliant CPE string formatting for db search commands [[#3308](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3308) @westonsteimel]
- Update APK NAK handling to be based on ownership-by-file-overlap relationship [[#3267](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3267) [#3286](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3286) @kzantow]
- Wrong version output [[#3306](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3306)]

### Additional Changes

- update anchore dependencies [[#3321](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3321) @anchore-oss-update-bot]
- update tool versions [[#3319](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3319) @anchore-oss-update-bot]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.110.0...v0.111.0)**

- use Syft for decoding CPEs [[#3058](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3058) @chovanecadam]

### Additional Changes

- bump github.com/buger/jsonparser to v1.1.2 [[#3297](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3297) @willmurphyscode]
- update quality gate labels [[#3293](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3293) @westonsteimel]

**[(Full Changelog)](https://github.com/anchore/grype/compare/v0.108.0...v0.109.0)**

### Added Features

### Bug Fixes

- VEX Documents still not working with syft sbom [[#3167](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3167)]
- VEX: minimal OpenVEX Example not working [[#3212](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/3212)]

### Additional Changes

- support more accurate scanning for postmarketos [[#3182](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3182) @westonsteimel]

- bump labels and add several test images [[#3215](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3215) @westonsteimel]
- improve VEX product and subcomponent matching [[#3168](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3168) @dariozachow]

### Additional Changes

- support context cancellation while finding vuln matches [[#3200](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3200) @luhring]

### Added Features

### Bug Fixes

- disable version fallback in EOL query [[#3195](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3195) @willmurphyscode]
- VEX documents with docker.io registry reference not matching, require index.docker.io instead [[#2818](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2818) [#3172](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/3172) @jainlakshya]

### Bug Fixes

- show related NVD records for non-NVD matches [[#2755](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2755) @kzantow]
- assume that a vulnerability with no ranges is always vulnerable [[#2759](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2759) @wagoodman]
- DB should hydrate for when the client has new features [[#2758](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2758) @wagoodman]
- show relationship back to NVD for all CVE ids [[#2756](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2756) @westonsteimel]
- properly escape CPE segments [[#2731](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2731) @kzantow]
- msrc matcher should search by package ecosystem, not by distro [[#2748](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2748) @westonsteimel]
- Grype does not report any vulnerabilities for CPEs with target_sw field set to value that does not correspond to known package type [[#2768](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2768) [#2772](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2772) @willmurphyscode]
- malformed CPE in grype db search output [[#2767](https://github.com/anchore/grype/issues/2767) [#2769](https://github.com/anchore/grype/pull/2769) @westonsteimel]
